subcodes.first_line: O friend of old and confidant of 'Abdu'l-Baha! Thy detailed letters were received and perused with the utmost care [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ندیم قدیم همدم عبدالبهاء نامه های مفصل شما رسید و بدقت قرائت گردید
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
